zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos於1396年12月21日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈斯費爾德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Brugge41歲，母親Alice Berkeley17歲。他於大約1421年與Catherine Clifford在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1453年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1466年4月13日在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利享年69歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos于1396年12月21日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈斯費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Brugge41岁，母亲Alice Berkeley17岁。他于大约1421年与Catherine Clifford在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1453年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1466年4月13日在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利享年69岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos was born on 21 December 1396, in Hasfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Brugge, was 41 and his mother, Alice Berkeley, was 17. He married Catherine Clifford about 1421, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1453, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 13 April 1466, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos est né le 21 décembre 1396, à Hasfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Brugge, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Clifford environ 1421, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1453, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1466, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos am 21. Dezember 1396 in Hasfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Brugge 41 und seine Mutter Alice Berkeley 17. Er hat um 1421 in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1453 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. April 1466 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos è nato il il 21 dicembre 1396 nel Hasfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Brugge, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Clifford circa 1421, nel Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1453, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 13 aprile 1466, nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Coberley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandosが1396年12月21日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bruggeは41歳，母Alice Berkeleyは17歳であった。約1421年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでCatherine Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1453年，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1466年4月13日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Frampton, Gloucester, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos(이)가 1396년 12월 21일 영국 그루스스터실르 하스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Brugge(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 Catherine Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1453년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1466년 4월 13일 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

pt.21 December 1396–13 April 1466: 21 de dezembro de 1396–13 de abril de 1466
pt.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos nasceu em 21 de dezembro de 1396, em Hasfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Brugge, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Berkeley, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Clifford aproximadamente 1421, em Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1453, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1466, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Frampton, Gloucester, England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos родился 21 декабря 1396 г. в местности хасфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Brugge было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Clifford около 1421 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1453 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 13 апреля 1466 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.21 December 1396–13 April 1466: 21 de diciembre de 1396–13 de abril de 1466
es.Frampton, Gloucester, England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Giles Brugge 4th Baron Chandos nació el 21 de diciembre de 1396, en Hasfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Brugge, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Berkeley, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Catherine Clifford aproximadamente 1421, en Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1453, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 13 de abril de 1466, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
